title: Plaque Assay For Screening Viral Concentrates for Bacteriophage
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.igxcbxn
materials: Pipet infected cells into molton top agar

steps.title: Grow a 4 mL liquid culture...
steps.instruction: Grow a 4 mL liquid culture of the bacterial isolate of interest in an appropriate growth medium overnight undetermined

steps.title: Dilute the culture 10-20% and let...
steps.instruction: Dilute the culture 10-20% and let it grow for ~4 hrs prior to plaque assay 04:00:00

steps.title: Melt 0
steps.instruction: Melt 0.6% top-agar in the microwave and let cool ~10-15 min 00:15:00

steps.title: Pipet 1
steps.instruction: Pipet 1.5 mL liquid culture into 1.5 mL Eppendorf tubes (or enough liquid culture for 500 µL for each plate sample that you want to make).

steps.title: Centrifuge 2 min at 14,000 rpm...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 2 min at 14,000 rpm 00:02:00 Some bacterial isolates do not require centrifugation. This is something that needs to be empirically determined for each putative bacterial host.

steps.title: Resuspend the remaining cells in 1
steps.instruction: Resuspend the remaining cells in 1.5 mL BG-11 media and mix well with pipet undetermined

steps.title: Pipet 4 mL of molton top...
steps.instruction: Pipet 4 mL of molton top agar into sterile culture tubes undetermined

steps.title: Keep top agar in a 45ºC...
steps.instruction: Keep top agar in a 45ºC head block to keep in a liquid state

steps.title: In 500 µL of resuspended cells,...
steps.instruction: In 500 µL of resuspended cells, add 100 µL of 0.22 µm filtered viral concentrate

steps.title: Incubate for 15 min at an...
steps.instruction: Incubate for 15 min at an appropriate growth temperature for the bacterium in use 00:15:00

steps.title: Pour top agar onto the plate and spread
steps.instruction: Pour top agar onto the plate and spread

steps.title: Let agar solidify at room temperature ~30-60 min 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Let agar solidify at room temperature ~30-60 min 01:00:00

steps.title: Flip plates over and place in...
steps.instruction: Flip plates over and place in an incubator at an appropriate growth temperature and light conditions for the bacterium in use

steps.title: Check plates daily until a confluent lawn appears on plates
steps.instruction: Check plates daily until a confluent lawn appears on plates. Plaques will be obvious clearings.
